title: Golden Apple Reskin
description: This is a simple Texture pack that just changes the golden apple and in turn the enchanted golden apple textures into golden slime balls
body: This is a simple Texture pack that just changes the golden apple and in turn the enchanted golden apple textures into golden slime balls theres not much else to say really but modrinth wants me to put 200 characters![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5008f5ffa4207bf0ce702d0fb171086a20b0aad_0.webp)
